patch.value: PRD/contract drift: reminders_weight and events_weight missing from search.tuning docs

resolveSearchTuning() implements reminders_weight=2 and events_weight=2 but PRD 13.3 search.tuning table and README list neither; the authoritative contract is wrong, so the weights are undiscoverable/unconfigurable.
Add both fields+defaults to PRD 13.3 and README; verify pm contracts surfaces the full tuning object; doc-only fix.
